mapper.select:
SELECT n.* FROM notification n LEFT JOIN notification_read nr ON nr.notification_id = n.id AND nr.user_id = #{userId} AND nr.deleted = 0 WHERE n.deleted = 0 AND (n.user_id = #{userId} OR n.user_id = 0)
AND n.type = #{type}
AND ( (n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.read_status = #{readStatus}) OR (n.user_id = 0 AND ((#{readStatus} = 1 AND nr.id IS NOT NULL) OR (#{readStatus} = 0 AND nr.id IS NULL))) )
ORDER BY n.created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notification n LEFT JOIN notification_read nr ON nr.notification_id = n.id AND nr.user_id = #{userId} AND nr.deleted = 0 WHERE n.deleted = 0 AND ( (n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.read_status = 0) OR (n.user_id = 0 AND nr.id IS NULL) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_read ( user_id, notification_id, read_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) SELECT #{userId}, n.id, NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM notification n LEFT JOIN notification_read nr ON nr.notification_id = n.id AND nr.user_id = #{userId} AND nr.deleted = 0 WHERE n.deleted = 0 AND n.user_id = 0 AND nr.id IS NULL ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE read_at = VALUES(read_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at), deleted = 0

INSERT INTO notification_read ( user_id, notification_id, read_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) SELECT #{userId}, n.id, NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), 0 FROM notification n WHERE n.id = #{notificationId} AND n.user_id = 0 AND n.deleted = 0 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE read_at = VALUES(read_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at), deleted = 0
